x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Fixed Method
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A set amount regardless of performance beyond threshold.

Comment:
Example: €100 bonus for opening an account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Percentage Method
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentive is a % of the transaction or target.

Comment:
Example: 2% cashback on credit card spending.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Tiered Method
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Reward increases in steps as performance grows.

Comment:
Example: 1% for first €1,000, 2% for next €1,000, 3% beyond €2,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Performance-Based Method
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Linked to specific KPIs or metrics.

Comment:
Example: Bonus based on achieving ≥ 95% SLA compliance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Hybrid Method
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Combines two or more calculation methods.

Comment:
Example: Fixed €50 + 1% of transactions exceeding €5,000.
